title: Transcript:A Tail of Two Cats
wikitext:
{{Transcript|quest}}
{{Incomplete|Talking to Hild without the catspeak amulet? Reclaiming enchanted version? Full inventory dialogue when receiving chores or claiming doctor/nurse hats, other minor missing dialogue}}
{{Transcript list|Apothecary|Bob (cat)|Cat|Gertrude|Hild|King Black Dragon|R4ng3rNo0b889|Neite|Reldo|Robert the Strong|Sphinx|Unferth|Dragonkin (A Tail of Two Cats)}}

==Starting Out==
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't own a cat:}}
** {{tmissing}}
* {{tcond|If the player owns a cat but doesn't have it with them:}}
** '''Unferth:''' Hello, do you have a cat?
** '''Player:''' I do but my cat is in a safe place.
** '''Unferth:''' Oh, hmm.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has their cat with them:}}
** '''Unferth:''' Hello, I see you have a cat.
** '''Cat:''' Meow.
** '''Player:''' Indeed I do! Do you have a cat?
** '''Unferth:''' I do! His name is Bob but I can't find him!
** '''Player:''' Oh dear...
** '''Unferth:''' I haven't seen him for a week! What am I to do?!
** {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Meow, meow.
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' What a wet blanket, Bob can look after himself.
*** '''Player:''' I know puss, but he is in distress.
*** '''Unferth:''' Whaa...
*** '''Player:''' Never mind.
*** {{tselect|Start the A Tail of Two Cats quest?}}
*** {{topt|Yes.}}
**** '''Player:''' Tell you what. I'll help you!
**** '''Unferth:''' Would you? Oh that would be so great!
**** '''Unferth:''' I don't want to leave the house in case Bob comes back.
**** '''Unferth:''' He must be hungry by now!
**** '''Cat:''' This guy gets on my nerves.
**** '''Player:''' Shh!
**** '''Unferth:''' Huh?
**** '''Player:''' Er... Where did you see Bob last?
**** '''Unferth:''' Well he usually comes back to me once a week. Usually a Wednesday a bit before lunchtime.
**** '''Player:''' I wonder why it's on a Wednesday.
**** '''Unferth:''' Hmph, well, this week he hasn't come back for his food and I'm worried.
**** '''Player:''' So he could be anywhere?
**** '''Unferth:''' I guess so.
**** '''Unferth:''' I've just had an idea!
**** '''Cat:''' Oh my, you win... a biscuit!
**** '''Player:''' Puss!
**** '''Unferth:''' Do you want to help or not?!
**** '''Player:''' I said I would, didn't I?
**** '''Unferth:''' Ok.
**** '''Unferth:''' My friend Hild is cleverer than me...
**** '''Cat:''' ANYONE would be 'cleverer'!
**** '''Player:''' Hehe!
**** '''Unferth:''' This isn't funny!
**** '''Player:''' Sorry!
**** '''Unferth:''' Where was I? Oh yes... my friend Hild might be able to locate where Bob is, she lives in the house just up the road.
**** '''Player:''' Ok. I'll go speak to her!
**** '''Unferth:''' Please hurry!
**** {{tact|end}}
*** {{topt|No.}}
**** '''Player:''' Goodbye.
**** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Unferth again===
* '''Unferth:''' Have you spoken to Hild about locating Bob?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.
* '''Unferth:''' She lives in the village, just follow the path north a little.
* '''Player:''' Ok, I'll speak to her.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Hild===
* '''Hild:''' Greetings Adventurer, why have you come to me in my abode?
* '''Player:''' Greetings Hild, I am trying to find Unferth's cat...
* '''Cat:''' Unferth's cat? Pfft! Unferth is Bob's human!
* '''Player:''' What are you talking about?
* '''Hild:''' Your cat speaks some truth, it is humans that misinterpret their relationship with cats.
* '''Player:''' You understand what my cat is saying?!
* '''Hild:''' Indeed.
* '''Player:''' Er...
* '''Cat:''' Bob didn't come home this week.
* '''Hild:''' Hmm. This is not like Bob, I wonder what could be the problem?
* '''Cat:''' I don't think there is a problem, Bob is probably chasing females again!
* '''Player:''' Hello? I'm still here!
* '''Hild:''' I am sorry [player name]. I will help Unferth find Bob, he has been a friend of mine for many years.
* '''Player:''' Ah... good! He could be anywhere though!
* '''Hild:''' I see you have an Amulet of Catspeak. If you open the amulet up, you will see contained inside is a mechanism. If this is enchanted correctly it can be used to locate a cat, in our case Bob. If you bring me five death runes
* '''Hild:''' then I will be able to perform the enchantment for you.
* {{tcond|Without 5 death runes:}}
** '''Player:''' I don't have the death runes.
** '''Hild:''' Come back to me when you have them.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|With 5 death runes:}}
** {{tact|below}}

===Talking to Hild again before enchanting the amulet===
* '''Hild:''' Greetings Adventurer, do you have the death runes so I can enchant your Amulet of Catspeak?
* {{tcond|Without 5 death runes:}}
** '''Player:''' Not yet.
** '''Hild:''' Come back to me when you have them.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|With 5 death runes:}}
** '''Player:''' I have the death runes with me now.
** '''Hild:''' Good. Give me the amulet so that I may perform the enchantment.
** {{tbox|pic=Catspeak amulet detail.png|You pass Hild the amulet.}}
** {{tbox|pic=Catspeak amulet(e) detail.png|Hild gives you the enchanted amulet.}}
** '''Hild:''' Using the enchanted amulet is easy; open up the amulet and you'll see a cat's face, use the whiskers to rotate the cats nose. You'll see the nose move and the new direction highlighted. When the nose points in the
** '''Hild:''' direction that Bob is in, the eyes will light up and the mouth will open. You'll need to head in that direction and then check the direction again. If you are very close to Bob then the eyes and mouth will animate no
** '''Hild:''' matter which way the nose is pointing. That's all there is to it, good luck!
** '''Player:''' Thanks!
** {{tact|end}}

==Finding Bob== <!--Without a cat, his dialogue is standard non-quest dialogue-->
* '''Player:''' Bob! I've found you at last!
* '''Cat:''' Hi Bob!
* '''Bob:''' Hi there son.
* '''Player:''' Don't start that again!
* '''Cat:''' The humans have been looking for you, they get worried too easily.
* '''Bob:''' Ah. I should've realised Unferth would miss me.
* '''Cat:''' What's up?
* '''Bob:''' Sigh. I can't believe it but I've fallen for Neite!
* '''Player:''' Neite...now, I'm sure I've heard that name before...
* '''Bob:''' What a beauty she is! It's the way the shimmer from the hot sand makes her eyes sparkle, the way she flicks her tail as she leaps gracefully across the pyramids, the way she cleans herself after a good rat. As you humans
* '''Bob:''' would say, she's the cat's whiskers. Oh how I long to be curled up with her in front of a log fire and a big bowl of tuna. Menaphos would be a great place to start a family.
* '''Cat:''' Wow! He's got it bad! Real bad! I never thought I'd see the day!
* '''Bob:''' I know but there is something about her. The way she...well, it's everything! Oh, the hidden pain of love. Love lies not with the eyes but with the mind, and therefore is the winged Cupid painted blind.
* '''Player:''' I'm starting to feel sick...
* '''Bob:''' I haven't been home because I've wanted to be alone.
* '''Cat:''' Does Neite feel the same way about you?
* '''Bob:''' She said she has feelings for me but would never get involved with someone like me that has no family or status.
* '''Cat:''' Don't you know who your parents are?
* '''Bob:''' All I know is that Gertrude found me on her doorstep one day. She looked after me when I was a kitten.
* '''Player:''' The crazy cat lady?
* '''Cat:''' Don't you have any memory of your parents?
* '''Bob:''' Nothing! The furthest back I can remember is Gertrude looking after me.
* '''Cat:''' [player name] let's go and talk to Gertrude! Perhaps she knows who Bob's parents are!
* '''Player:''' Do I look like a match maker?!
* '''Cat:''' Come on! We can help Bob!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Bob again===
* '''Player:''' Hi Bob!
* '''Bob:''' Hmph...Oh Neite...My bounty is as boundless as the sea, my love as deep. The more I give to thee, the more I have, for both are infinite.
* '''Cat:''' OK OK... This is becoming dangerous. If we don't do something he will probably implode! We'll go to Gertrude and ask if she knows who your parents are!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Gertrude===
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Ask about Bob's parents.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello again Gertrude!
** '''Gertrude:''' Welcome back adventurer! How is your cat?
** {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Meow.
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' I'm fine thanks.
*** '''Player:''' He says he's fine.
*** '''Gertrude:''' What can I do for you then? I hope it's not about death runes. I heard a terrible rumour you know.
*** '''Player:''' Death runes? No idea.... No, it's not that. I, erm...
*** '''Gertrude:''' Come on, spit it out.
*** '''Player:''' This is going to sound silly...
*** '''Gertrude:''' Why, are you going to talk in a stupid accent? Go on, try me.
*** '''Player:''' Ok... Well... Do you know who Bob's parents are?
*** '''Gertrude:''' Bob.... you mean the big tomcat who hangs around the Heroes' guild? No, I'm afraid I don't know a lot about him. People round here know I care for sick and abandoned animals, and one day I found a basket with
*** '''Gertrude:''' a kitten inside it left on my doorstep. I brought him up as best I could and he soon learnt to take care of himself. He really was an amazing little thing. There was this one time when.....
*** '''Cat:''' We don't have time for this, Bob could be in trouble! Tell her to get on with it.
*** '''Gertrude:''' Crumbs! Your cat's quite noisy isn't it? Is everything OK?
*** '''Player:''' No, it's erm... It needs to be taken to the vets, URGENTLY. For an emergency AMPUTATION!
*** '''Cat:''' I do hope you're joking. These claws are real you know, none of your bronze nonsense.
*** '''Player:''' See, it just can't stop howling. Allergic to cat hair apparently. Anyway, you were talking about Bob's parents.
*** '''Gertrude:''' Oh was I... Oh yes, well, I'm afraid I don't know anything about them adventurer.
*** '''Cat:''' Hang on, maybe this is something to do with the legend... yes, it just might. Have you ever heard of Robert the Strong?
*** '''Player:''' Vaguely?
*** '''Cat:''' Ask Gertrude if she knows anything.
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... Gertrude, do you know anything of the legend, Robert the Strong?
*** '''Gertrude:''' No, sorry. If it's a legend, it's Reldo you need to talk to. He's in Varrock palace library, knows all about that kind of thing.
*** '''Cat:''' Good old Gertrude! Come on, lets go.
*** '''Player:''' But...
*** '''Cat:''' I'll explain later!
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

===Talking to Gertrude again===
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Ask about Bob's parents.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello Gertrude!
** '''Gertrude:''' Greetings adventurer, have you spoken to Reldo in the palace library about Robert the Strong?
** '''Player:''' Not yet.
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Come on, lets go.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

===Talking to Reldo===
* '''Reldo:''' Hello there, [player name].
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|I have a cat related question.}}
** '''Player:''' I have a cat related question.
** '''Reldo:''' Yes?
** '''Player:''' Well...
** {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Meow.
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Go on... ask him.
*** '''Player:''' Okay, okay. I'm on it.
*** '''Player:''' Do you know anything about Robert the Strong?
*** '''Reldo:''' Ah, Robert the Strong. There's some details on him in one of my books on the history of Gielinor. Let's see now...
*** '''Reldo:''' Fourth Age... Popular Lore... Ah here we are, Robert the Strong!
*** '''Reldo:''' 'Not much is known about the hero called Robert the Strong. Most folk tales describe him as being taller than the tallest human and far stronger than the strongest warrior.'
*** '''Reldo:''' 'He wields a six foot tall longbow and travels with his faithful panther, Odysseus. He is said to have had a personal crusade against the dragonkin...'
*** '''Player:''' Dragonkin?
*** '''Reldo:''' I'm coming to that.
*** '''Reldo:''' 'The stories tell of the dragonkin being an intelligent race of bird-like creatures that walked rather than using their wings. They are said to be immortal, but cannot reproduce.'
*** '''Reldo:''' 'Because of this, they became very afraid of death and shunned all other races.'
*** '''Reldo:''' 'Some even say the dragonkin made corrupted versions of themselves for protection, what we now know as dragons. However, this has never been proven.'
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... Doesn't sound very believable.
*** '''Reldo:''' There's no doubt that some elements of these tales have been overexaggerated for storytelling purposes, but you should be careful of outright dismissing them.
*** '''Reldo:''' Robert the Strong is a name that often comes up in stories from the Fourth Age. There's no reason not to believe that these folk tales are based on events that actually happened.
*** '''Player:''' Thank you Reldo, you've been most... helpful.
*** '''Player:''' That was a nice tale for mothers to tell their children, but I don't see how this helps Bob?
*** '''Cat:''' Don't you think it's odd that no one knows where Bob came from?
*** '''Player:''' I guess, but he's just a cat... right?
*** '''Cat:''' I'd hoped you would've understood by now that there's more to cats than humans believe!
*** '''Player:''' Ok, ok! I get your point, after all I'm being dragged round Gielinor by... my cat!
*** '''Cat:''' I wouldn't say dragged... let's call it a partnership!
*** '''Player:''' Ok!
*** '''Player:''' So are you saying that Robert the Strong is... is...
*** '''Player:''' Bob?!
*** '''Cat:''' Let's ask Bob!
*** '''Player:''' Let's go!
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Do you have anything to trade?|quest=no}}
* {{topt|I'd better get going.|quest=no}}

===Talking to Reldo again===
* '''Reldo:''' Hello there, [player name].
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|So, about Robert the Strong...}}
** '''Player:''' So, about Robert the Strong...
** '''Reldo:''' Yes?
** {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Player:''' Never mind, I've found out enough now, I should go back to Bob.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' We've found out enough now, we should go back to Bob.
*** '''Player:''' Ok.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Do you have anything to trade?|quest=no}}
* {{topt|I'd better get going.|quest=no}}

==Returning to Bob==
* '''Player:''' Hi Bob!
* '''Bob:''' Did you find out who my parents are?
* '''Player:''' Not exactly...
* '''Cat:''' We think you are... or used to be... Robert the Strong!
* '''Bob:''' Robert the who?
* '''Player:''' I thought this was stupid.
* '''Cat:''' Robert the Strong was a great hero, you have no memory of him?
* '''Bob:''' No... I'm afraid not.
* '''Cat:''' Does a black panther called Odysseus ring any bells?
* '''Bob:''' No...
* '''Cat:''' What about the dragonkin? A vicious race of bird like creatures?
* '''Bob:''' Nothing...
* '''Player:''' Looks like theres nothing else we can do puss.
* '''Cat:''' I'm not done yet!
* '''Cat:''' Do you remember when you were hypnotised by the Devourer?
* '''Player:''' Well no... I was hypnotised!
* '''Cat:''' Hehe!
* '''Cat:''' The Sphinx understood how you were hypnotised, it might be able to access Bob's memories of Robert the Strong.
* '''Player:''' Sounds crazy... guess it might work!
* '''Cat:''' Bye for now Bob, we're going to speak to the Sphinx.
* '''Bob:''' Bye.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Bob again===
* '''Player:''' Hi Bob!
* '''Bob:''' Have you been to the Sphinx yet?
* '''Cat:''' No we haven't. Come on [player name], let's go.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Unferth===
* '''Unferth:''' Have you found Bob yet?
* '''Player:''' Don't worry, we're working on it.
* '''Unferth:''' Please hurry, I'm worried.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the Sphinx===
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Ask the Sphinx for help for Bob.}}
** '''Player:''' Good day.
** '''Sphinx:''' What is it human?
** '''Player:''' Sphinx, we need your help!
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Yes, please help!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Very well, I see you have a close relationship with your cat, I will help you if I can.
*** '''Sphinx:''' What is the problem?
*** '''Player:''' Thank you!
*** '''Player:''' Bob is in love with Neite but we need to prove that he used to be Robert the Strong before she will have anything to do with him!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Slow down human!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Bob has fallen in love?
*** '''Sphinx:''' This I did not foresee!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Who is this Robert the Strong that you speak of?
*** '''Player:''' He was a mighty hero!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Human myths interest me not.
*** '''Cat:''' Robert the Strong was no ordinary human though!
*** '''Sphinx:''' It is true that there is something about Bob... there is the mark of power on him, I have ignored it for too long.
*** '''Player:''' But Bob has no memory of this!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Then it is the time for action!
*** '''Sphinx:''' Come with me into the desert so we are not disturbed.
*** {{tselect|Select an option}}
*** {{topt|View the cutscene (5 mins 20 secs).}}
**** {{tact|below}}
*** {{topt|Skip cutscene and view summary.}}
**** {{tmissing}}
** {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Meow.
*** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

===Cutscene===
* '''Sphinx:''' Quiet please.... I shall summon Bob.
* '''Bob:''' What..? What happened?
* '''Bob:''' I was eating a particularly nice piece of tuna.
* '''Sphinx:''' Greetings Bob.
* '''Bob:''' Oh, hi there Sphinx.
* '''Bob:''' Hi there [player name], what's going on?
* '''Sphinx:''' I have brought you here to find out who you really are.
* '''Bob:''' So you buy this Robert the Strong stuff?
* '''Sphinx:''' I have long suspected that your appearance as an ordinary cat belies your true nature.
* '''Bob:''' Hey! I'm just this cat, you know?
* '''Sphinx:''' Look into my eyes.
* '''Bob:''' Sure... whatever.
* '''Sphinx:''' You are now under my influence.
* '''Sphinx:''' Let's start with something simple. What is your name?
* '''Bob:''' My name is Bob.
* '''Sphinx:''' Good. Are you or have you ever been called Robert the Strong?
* '''Bob:''' I... I don't know.
* '''Sphinx:''' Think back to your earliest memories.
* '''Bob:''' I see a big cat...
* '''Sphinx:''' Where are you now?
* '''Bob:''' I am in front of a dark tower... the cat is called Odysseus.
* '''Sphinx:''' What is your name?
* '''Bob:''' My name is Robert.
* '''Bob:''' I am walking towards the tower...
{{Qact|A cutscene appears showing the Dragonkin castle}}
* '''Robert the Strong:''' Come, Odysseus!
* '''Dragonkin:''' Hesente!
{{Qact|Odysseus and Robert the Strong engage in battle with the dragonkin}}
{{Qact|Odysseus lies on the floor, the dragonkin and Robert are very damaged, Robert kneels down}}
* '''Dragonkin:''' Crasortius!
{{Qact|Robert stands up}}
* '''Robert the Strong:''' Never!
{{Qact|Robert the Strong defeats the dragonkin}}
{{Qact|The cutscene closes}}
* '''Sphinx:''' You are no longer under my influence.
* '''Cat:''' Wow Bob! You really are Robert the Strong!
* '''Bob:''' I am?
* '''Cat:''' Yes! When you were hypnotised you told us of when you defeated a dragonkin!
* '''Bob:''' I did?
* '''Cat:''' Yes! How can Neite refuse you now!
* '''Bob:''' Really?
* '''Cat:''' Sphinx, summon Neite please!
* '''Sphinx:''' There are more important matters than match making.
* '''Cat:''' That can wait! Bob has been love sick, we have to tell Neite!
* '''Sphinx:''' Very well! I shall summon Neite!
* '''Neite:''' Oh... furballs!
* '''Cat:''' Hi Neite!
* '''Neite:''' Hello, to what do I owe this pleasure?
* '''Cat:''' Bob is Robert the Strong!
* '''Neite:''' What are you talking about?
* '''Cat:''' The Sphinx hypnotised Bob. Bob told us about when he was Robert the Strong fighting dragonkin.
* '''Neite:''' So you're supposed to be Robert the Strong?
* '''Bob:''' So they tell me.
* '''Neite:''' Hmph.
* '''Sphinx:''' For too long I have ignored the fact that there is a mark of power on Bob. Under my influence Bob was able to recall memories that had remained hidden until now. It proves he is, or was, Robert the Strong.
* '''Neite:''' Wow.
* '''Neite:''' Come here you.
* '''Neite:''' {{Colour|#000080|(Neite whispers in Bob's ear.)}}
* '''Bob:''' Neite!
* '''Bob:''' Of course kitten.
* '''Bob:''' Hey [player name], could you do me a favour?
* '''Player:''' Of course.
* '''Bob:''' Myself and Neite are going away for a few days. Could you look after Unferth for me whilst I'm away?
* '''Player:''' Er... sure.
* '''Bob:''' I'll give you a list of what needs doing.
* '''Player:''' OK, no problem Bob.
* '''Sphinx:''' [player name], since you are to look after Unferth, shall I teleport you to his house?
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Yes, teleport me to Unferth's house.}}
** {{qact|The player is teleported to Burthorpe.}}
** {{tbox|pic=Chores detail.png|Bob has given you a list of chores to help look after Unferth.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No thanks, I'll stay in Sophanem.}}
** {{tbox|pic=Chores detail.png|Bob has given you a list of chores to help look after Unferth.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the Sphinx again===
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Ask the Sphinx for help for Bob.}}
** '''Player:''' Good day.
** '''Sphinx:''' Have you completed the chores that Bob asked you to?
** '''Player:''' Not yet.
** {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
*** '''Cat:''' Come on!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

==Unferth's chores==
* '''Player:''' Hi Unferth, I'm doing some ch...
* '''Cat:''' Hiss!
* '''Player:''' What?!
* {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
** '''Cat:''' Don't tell him you're doing his chores!
** '''Cat:''' Part of the cat-human relationship is to let them believe they are in control.
** '''Player:''' Ah... OK.
** '''Player:''' Never mind.
** '''Unferth:''' Hmph.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
** '''Cat:''' Meow!
** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to your cat about chores===
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Ask about the chores Bob set you to do.}}
** {{tselect|Select an option}}
** {{topt|What do I have to do for 'Tidy House'?}}
*** '''Player:''' What do I have to do for 'Tidy House'?
*** {{tcond|Before finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' Look round the house for anything messy that needs to be put right.
*** {{tcond|After finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' You've finished that chore.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|What do I have to do for 'Warm Human'?}}
*** '''Player:''' What do I have to do for 'Warm Human'?
*** {{tcond|Before finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' Theres{{sic}} only one source of warmth in the house, I suggest you use it.
*** {{tcond|After finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' You've finished that chore.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|What do I have to do for 'Feed Human'?}}
*** '''Player:''' What do I have to do for 'Feed Human'?
*** {{tcond|Before finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' There's a table with empty dishes, I think they need refilling.
**** '''Player:''' What does Unferth eat?
**** '''Cat:''' I've no idea, perhaps you can find out.
*** {{tcond|After finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' You've finished that chore.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|What do I have to do for 'Tidy Human'?}}
*** '''Player:''' What do I have to do for 'Tidy Human'?
*** {{tcond|Before finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' Have you noticed that Unferth's hair has grown rather long?
**** '''Player:''' Do you know where I can get some scissors?
**** '''Cat:''' It's so long I should think you'd need shears to cut it!
*** {{tcond|After finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' You've finished that chore.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|What do I have to do for 'Tend Garden'?}}
*** '''Player:''' What do I have to do for 'Tend Garden'?
*** {{tcond|Before weeding the garden}}
**** '''Cat:''' Check the garden to see if anything needs tending.
*** {{tcond|After weeding the garden}}
**** '''Cat:''' Check the garden to see if anything needs tending.
**** '''Player:''' I've weeded the garden, now what?
**** '''Cat:''' I'm sure there should be something growing in the garden.
*** {{tcond|After finishing the chore}}
**** '''Cat:''' You've finished that chore.
*** {{tact|end}}

==Medical emergency?==
* '''Player:''' Hi Unferth, is there anything I can do for you?
* '''Unferth:''' Ugh...
* '''Cat:''' Now what?!
* '''Unferth:''' I don't feel so good...
* '''Player:''' Oh dear! What's up?
* '''Cat:''' Nothing, I bet!
* '''Player:''' Shh!
* '''Unferth:''' I think I need the Doctor...ugh...
* '''Player:''' What Doctor is that?
* '''Unferth:''' Just a Doctor... please hurry... I don't think I'll last long...
* '''Cat:''' Snarl!
* '''Player:''' We can't let Bob see him like this!
* '''Cat:''' I guess you're right, there is the Apothecary in Varrock.
* '''Player:''' Good idea!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Unferth again===
* '''Unferth:''' I think I need the Doctor...ugh...
* '''Player:''' Don't worry, I'll get the Apothecary from Varrock!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the Apothecary===
* '''Apothecary:''' I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Can you make potions for me?|quest=no}}
* {{topt|Talk about A Tail of Two Cats.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello Apothecary, Unferth has fallen ill. Could you go and see him please?
** '''Apothecary:''' That Unferth! Honestly, I have been to see him more times than my Mother's hair has fallen out!
** '''Cat:''' I never did like that guy!
** '''Player:''' I'm beginning to agree with you!
** '''Player:''' What can I do with Unferth?
** '''Cat:''' I have a few suggestions!
** '''Apothecary:''' It's quite simple. Unferth is what we call a hypochondriac; he isn't ill but he thinks he is. All you need to do is convince him you are a Doctor or a Nurse and give him a potion to make him 'better'.
** '''Player:''' How do I make Unferth believe I am a Doctor or Nurse?
** '''Apothecary:''' Easy, make sure you are dressed in white robes and take one of these hats to wear.
** {{tcond|If choosing the Doctor's hat:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Doctor's hat detail.png|The Apothecary has given you a Doctor's Hat.}}
** {{tcond|If choosing the Nurse hat:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Nurse hat detail.png|The Apothecary has given you a Nurse's Hat.}}
** '''Apothecary:''' Then all you need to do is give him a vial of water and he'll take it thinking it's a cure potion.
** '''Player:''' Haha!
** '''Player:''' I always wanted to be a Doctor!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

===Talking to the Apothecary again===
* '''Player:''' Hello Apothecary.
* '''Apothecary:''' Have you been to 'cure' Unferth by dressing up in white robes, wearing the hat and giving him a vial of water?
* '''Player:''' That's what I was going to do! Thanks, I'll see you later.
* {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If you lost the Doctor/Nurse hat:}}
** '''Apothecary:''' I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?
** {{tselect|Select an option}}
** {{topt|Can you make potions for me?|quest=no}}
** {{topt|Talk about A Tail of Two Cats.}}
*** '''Player:''' Hello Apothecary, I've lost that hat you gave me.
*** '''Apothecary:''' No problem, I get plenty of these from Gielinor Hospital Supplies.
*** {{tcond|If choosing the Doctor's hat:}}
**** {{tbox|pic=Doctor's hat detail.png|The Apothecary has given you a Doctor's Hat.}}
*** {{tcond|If choosing the Nurse hat:}}
**** {{tbox|pic=Nurse hat detail.png|The Apothecary has given you a Nurse's Hat.}}
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Talk about something else.|quest=no}}

===Returning to Unferth===
* '''Player:''' Good day Unferth, I am Doctor [player name].
* {{tcond|If not wearing the right equipment:}}
** '''Unferth:''' No you're not! A Doctor wouldn't be holding that!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If wearing the right equipment:}}
** '''Unferth:''' I am so glad to see you Doctor!
** '''Unferth:''' I am not a well man!
** '''Player:''' What seems to be the problem?
** '''Cat:''' Theres something wrong with his head!
** '''Unferth:''' My back hurts!
** '''Player:''' No problem...
** '''Unferth:''' I think my arm is broken!
** '''Player:''' We can...
** '''Unferth:''' Then there's my spleen!
** '''Player:''' Your what...?
** '''Unferth:''' My liver has packed in!
** '''Player:''' All you need to do is take this potion.
** {{tbox|pic=Vial of water detail.png|You give Unferth the 'potion'.}}
** '''Unferth:''' Is that it?! I'm much more ill than that!
** '''Cat:''' We could offer to bonk him on the head with a big hammer.
** '''Player:''' Hehe!
** '''Unferth:''' Doctor Please take this seriously! I demand treatment!
** '''Player:''' Of course sir! The potion I have given you is the latest technology. It cures all known illnesses, and a few unknown ones. It's what we call in the trade a 'miracle cure'.
** '''Unferth:''' Wow! What can I say... I feel special!
** '''Player:''' Do you feel better?
** '''Unferth:''' I'm not sure...
** '''Cat:''' Argh!
** '''Unferth:''' Wait! I feel something! Yes! I can feel the potion working... The pain has gone... I can walk on my leg... Doctor! I'm cured!
** '''Player:''' That's... great! Phew!
** '''Cat:''' Indeed. Bob should be back by now; let's go find him.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Unferth after "curing" him===
* '''Player:''' Hello Unferth.
* '''Unferth:''' I feel much better now.
* '''Player:''' That's good to hear.
* {{tcond|If the player is wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
** '''Cat:''' We should go and see Bob now Unferth is feeling better, he should be back by now.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player isn't wearing an amulet of catspeak:}}
** '''Cat:''' Meow, meow.
** '''Player:''' Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
** {{tact|end}}

==Back to Bob==
* '''Player:''' Hi Bob! How's it hang... going?
* '''Bob:''' Wonderful! Neite and I have been all over Gielinor! We 'borrowed' a magic carpet...
* {{qact|A cutscene begins at a Sophanem}}
* '''Bob:''' Where do we turn here?
* '''Neite:''' North... I think.
* '''Bob:''' You think?!
* '''Neite:''' Yes: north.
* '''Neite:''' Slow down!
* '''Bob:''' For what?
* '''Neite:''' That camel!
* '''Bob:''' What camel?!
* {{qact|Bob and Neite visit the King Black Dragon}}
* '''Neite:''' Are you sure this is a good idea?
* '''Bob:''' Yeh, the old King and I go way back.
* '''Bob:''' Hey old King! How's things?
* '''King Black Dragon:''' Same as always: adventurers trying to kill me.
* '''Bob:''' There, there, could be worse!
* '''King Black Dragon:''' I guess... one moment...
* '''R4ng3rNo0b889:''' {{overhead|Lolz die noob!}}
* {{qact|The King Black Dragon kills R4ng3rNo0b889 with dragonfire.}}
* '''King Black Dragon:''' See what I mean?
* '''Bob:''' Mate! You need a new line of work!
* {{qact|Back at Sophanem}}
* '''Neite:''' I said left at the camel!
* '''Bob:''' What camel?!
* '''Neite:''' You're too close to the pyramid!
* '''Bob:''' Do you want to drive?!
* '''Neite:''' I think we're lost.
* '''Bob:''' No, I know where I'm going.
* '''Neite:''' Are we there yet?
* '''Bob:''' No.
* '''Neite:''' Are we there yet?
* '''Bob:''' No!
* {{qact|On a ship at sea}}
* '''Bob:''' I'm the King of Gielinor!
* {{qact|The cutscene ends}}
* '''Player:''' Phew!
* {{tact|end}}

===Returning to Unferth===
* '''Player:''' Hi Unferth!
* '''Unferth:''' Hello! Bob came home today! I'm so happy!
* '''Player:''' That's good news!
* '''Unferth:''' Fat lot of use you were! He came home on his own!
* '''Player:''' Er...
* '''Cat:''' This guy is unbelievable!
* '''Player:''' You're not wrong.
* '''Unferth:''' Of course I'm not wrong.
* '''Player:''' I'll be going now.
* '''Unferth:''' Before you go, I found the strangest thing. There was a package left under the bed, it's addressed to you.
* {{qact|Congratulations! Quest complete!}}
